title: Glixed's Soups
description: This mod adds soups to the game.
body:
# Glixed's Soups
## Soups:
- Broth (for creating most soups)
- Chicken Soup
- Potato Soup
- Notch Soup (Notch apple effects)
- Blood Soup (Strength effects)
- Tomato Basil Soup
- <--- and many more to come! --->
## Achivements:
- "Souperior" - Granted when player makes the "broth" item.
- "Soup of the Gods" - Granted when the player consumes a "Notch Soup"
## Extra(s):
- Clay Bowl (Needed to make all soups).
### Glixed, June 2024. Last updated 4th of June, 2024.![Logo of Glixed's Soups](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea970586a399937652367d852347ae3f94ae6c42.png)
